About Me

Curious designer,
intentional thinker

I'm Shreya — a UX/UI Design student at Pune, Maharashtra, drawn to the space where human psychology meets digital craft. My work starts with questions: What do people actually need? Where do they get stuck? What would make this feel effortless?

I believe great design is invisible — it gets out of the way and lets people do what they came to do. Whether I'm building wireframes, running user research, or polishing a final UI, I bring the same curiosity and care to every stage of the process.

I'm currently building my portfolio with real case studies while sharpening my skills in Figma, visual design, and interaction design.

Featured Work

Case Studies

UX Research · UI Design · Mobile · Android

Clarity — Date or Dip

Know what they mean

A mobile app designed to help young adults make confident post-date decisions by reducing overthinking and emotional confusion. Clarity analyses communication patterns, pre-date signals, and post-date behaviour to give users clear, non-judgmental insights about the person they're seeing.

01 Research & Analysis
02 Ideation
03 Wireframing
04 Final UI

Research · Stakeholder Mapping

Key Insights · 25 Participants

People don't feel emotionally safe in dating — because clarity is missing.

Most want something serious but hide it to avoid scaring others.

Understanding someone's intention takes weeks — discomfort builds.

They want clarity in a low-pressure format: text/call over awkward conversations.

Wireframes

Final UI Screens
